title: Bitcoin outlook improves amid 6% weekly gain: Can BTC bulls push higher?
summary: Bitcoin buyers have returned to spot, futures and ETF markets but geopolitical headwinds could quickly unravel the progress of the past two weeks.

title: 1inch co-founder says he was fired, announces new venture
summary: Anton Bukov said that he no longer took an active role at 1inch and had been “fired” in 2025 after pushing for changes to the company’s management and operations.

title: Sweetgreen Shares Slide to Three-Month Low on Cyclosporiasis Outbreak Fears
summary: Sweetgreen Inc. has lost more than a quarter of its market value in just four days as investors dump the stock due to fears about outbreak of cyclosporiasis — an intestinal infection caused by parasites in raw produce and water that has sickened thousands across the US.

title: Chip Stocks Get Hit as AI Spending Anxiety Builds: Markets Wrap
summary: A selloff in chipmakers dragged down stocks amid concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations, with a resurgence in geopolitical risks also weighing on sentiment.

title: Fed Chair Warsh: No Bailout for Crypto Industry in Crisis
summary:

Fed Chair Warsh: No Bailout for Crypto Industry in Crisis
Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh said the Fed will not bail out failing crypto firms, insisting the industry must bear its own risks while regulators finalize rules under the GENIUS Act.

title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
summary: Eligible customers can now buy, sell, and hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with Morgan Stanley via Zero Hash.

title: Bitcoin Q-Day Recovery Proposal Aims to Let Users Prove Ownership After Quantum Attack
summary: Project Eleven says a new post-quantum cryptographic proof could help Bitcoin users recover wallets after Q-Day by verifying ownership.

title: MegaETH sunsets Mega Mafia accelerator program, noting ‘most’ of its successful apps left
summary: MegaETH did not take equity or governance positions in the approximately 20 projects incubated in the Mega Mafia.

title: JPMorgan says bitcoin outlook sees ‘encouraging sign’ as Strategy boosts cash reserves
summary: Strategy's larger cash reserves and improving institutional demand in bitcoin futures are "encouraging signs" for bitcoin, JPMorgan said.

title: Zelenskyy government plunged into turmoil after defence minister fired

title: Russian strikes threaten Ukraine’s Black Sea grain trade
summary: Wheat prices have surged as heavy attacks disrupt shipments
